notes: 6 GB VRAM: batch>2 at imgsz 416 often OOM on yolov8n; use batch=1 if CUDA OOM.
16 GB system RAM: workers must stay 0 on Windows (spawn copies the dataset in memory).
disk cache uses free space on C: (~140 GB) and avoids RAM cache spikes.
chunk_epochs=5: each Python run trains 5 epochs then exits; train_loop.ps1 restarts (stable on this GPU driver).
If cuBLAS/backward crashes persist: set device to cpu (very slow) or reboot GPU driver.
fraction=1.0 uses the full merged set; use 0.25 only for quick smoke tests.
